title: Vinte anos da Colonialidade do Poder, Eurocentrismo e América Latina de Aníbal Quijano
brief_justification: The article is a conceptual and intellectual-historical essay about Quijano's coloniality of power framework. It uses quotations, theoretical interpretation, and secondary literature, but it does not present original empirical evidence, quantitative analysis, qualitative research evidence, statistical inference, or a causal identification design.
